_comment: A DATED snapshot of the Live-tier benchmark numbers, captured against real models via OpenRouter and the real competitor libraries. Not reproducible offline (Track 1/2 need a model key). It is the traceable source for the README's Live figures and the generated assets (benchmarks/render_assets.py reads it). Regenerate with the commands in each section's `reproduce` field.

track2_uplift.setup: 15 company-specific policy questions a model cannot know from pretraining; 4 models x 2 runs; grounded-answer accuracy, direct vs through Vincio; every routed answer cited

track1_model.reproduce: python benchmarks/eval_live.py --provider openrouter --model <id> --benchmarks reasoning.gsm8k knowledge.mmlu --tier live --dataset-dir <real GSM8K/MMLU slices>
track1_model.setup: real official GSM8K (n=20) and MMLU (n=15) slices via Hugging Face; small-slice demonstration, reported not gated

track3_feature_headline.setup: Vincio features vs the real competitor library, measured live on this machine (deterministic quality metric; latency is machine-relative and rounded)

plates.sub: current fact vs a naive keyword store

universal_reasoning_live.reproduce: OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... python benchmarks/reasoning_uplift_live.py --models openai/gpt-4.1-mini,meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct --json && OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... python benchmarks/reasoning_multilingual_live.py --models openai/gpt-4.1-mini --json
universal_reasoning_live.setup: Tier-L small-sample capability run on six reviewed cases: arithmetic, logic, multi-step, current-fact, a plan-shaped constrained decision, and a cite-a-source honesty case. One run per case, reported rather than CI-gated; refusal of an unverifiable claim counts as safe, never correct.

reasoning.caveat: the current-fact Python case was answered 3.15 from a live source that lists the not-yet-released 3.15 line as supported — cited and web-verified but scored wrong against the 3.14 gold

small_model.plan_mode_note: with tolerant plan validation the 3B model's plan mode activated on the multi-step case (6 typed steps, deterministically verified); a malformed plan still falls back to heuristic decomposition observably
small_model.upstream_note: the model's OpenRouter upstream was rate-limited during the capture window; retryable empty-payload handling absorbed the transient faults and no run died to an upstream error in this capture, with the engine's spaced salvage pass in reserve (gated by transient_failure_salvaged) for the case where every pass dies
